options.name: -frame
options.description: Specifies that the table columns have a fixed frame or border, based on the minimum and maximum width settings

options.name: -indent
options.description: Specifies the number of spaces to leave on the left for that particular table

options.name: -major_sort
options.description: Specifies the column to be used in the major sort

options.name: -max_widths
options.description: Specifies the maximum width for each table column in the report specified by the -name argument

options.name: -min_widths
options.description: Specifies the minimum width for each table column in the report specified by the -name argument

options.name: -minor_sort
options.description: Specifies the column to be used in the minor sort

options.name: -name
options.description: Changes the formatting for the specified table

options.name: -no_frame_fix_width
options.description: Specifies that the table columns have a fixed minimum width, but no maximum width

options.name: -nosplit
options.description: Specifies that each column follows the preceding column without splitting to a new line, if the data in one column overruns the next column
